items.definition_en: A perennial is a plant that lives for more than two years.
items.example_en: The perennial in my garden blooms every spring.

items.definition_en: A herbaceous border is a garden area planted with flowering plants.
items.example_en: She added a herbaceous border to make her garden more colorful.

items.definition_en: Foliage is the collective leaves of plants.
items.example_en: The foliage in the garden turns yellow in autumn.

items.definition_en: Ground cover is a low plant that grows across the soil surface.
items.example_en: We chose ground cover to fill empty spaces under the trees.

items.definition_en: A shrub is a small to medium-sized woody plant.
items.example_en: A shrub provides privacy along the garden fence.

items.definition_en: A cultivar is a plant variety produced by selective breeding.
items.example_en: They planted a new cultivar of rose in the front yard.

items.definition_en: A sapling is a young tree.
items.example_en: Each spring they plant a sapling in the backyard.

items.definition_en: A specimen plant is a plant grown for display as a focal point.
items.example_en: The old oak makes a stunning specimen plant in the garden.

items.definition_en: A deciduous tree is a tree that loses its leaves each autumn.
items.example_en: A deciduous tree shades the patio in summer.

items.definition_en: An evergreen is a plant that keeps its leaves all year round.
items.example_en: The evergreen adds color during the winter months.

items.definition_en: A climber is a plant that grows upward by attaching itself to surfaces.
items.example_en: A climber covered the trellis with bright flowers.

items.definition_en: An annual is a plant that completes its life cycle in one year.
items.example_en: They planted annuals for a burst of summer color.

items.definition_en: A cutting is a piece of a plant used to grow a new plant.
items.example_en: My neighbor shared a cutting from her rose bush.

items.definition_en: A rootstock is the root part of a plant onto which another plant is grafted.
items.example_en: The gardener used a strong rootstock for the grafting process.

items.definition_en: A seedling is a young plant grown from a seed.
items.example_en: Each seedling was carefully transplanted into the garden bed.

items.definition_en: A bulb is an underground storage organ of some plants.
items.example_en: She planted tulip bulbs in the autumn.

items.definition_en: Variegation is the appearance of differently colored zones in leaves or stems.
items.example_en: The variegation on this hosta makes it stand out.

items.definition_en: An undershrub is a low-growing shrub.
items.example_en: Lavender is often grown as an attractive undershrub.

items.definition_en: An ornamental grass is a decorative grass used in gardens.
items.example_en: Ornamental grass adds texture to the flower beds.

items.definition_en: A standard rose is a rose bush trained to grow on a single tall stem.
items.example_en: They planted a standard rose as a centerpiece in the yard.
